x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies that the incentive is paid in cash or direct monetary transfer to the participants account.

Comment:
Example:
A €500 quarterly performance bonus transferred to an employees bank account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank Transfer Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies that incentive payments are made via direct bank transfer.

Comment:
Example:
Cashback reward credited directly to a customers checking account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cheque Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies that incentives are paid via cheque or bank draft, which must be deposited or cashed by the participant.

Comment:
Example:
Sales contest winner receives a cheque for €1,000.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Voucher Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Voucher / Coupon Payment Modality specifies that the incentive is delivered as a voucher, gift card, or coupon instead of cash.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Point Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Points / Loyalty Program Modality specifies that incentives are credited as points in a loyalty or rewards program.

Comment:
Example:
Customer earns 500 reward points for using a credit card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Deferred / Scheduled Payment Modality specifies that incentive payment is delayed or scheduled to be paid at a later date.

Comment:
Example:
Annual sales bonus paid after fiscal year-end.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditional / Performance-Based Payment Modality specifies that payment depends on meeting specific conditions, targets, or performance criteria

Comment:
Example:
Sales incentive paid only if 120% of target sales is achieved..
